% Seed Policy Statement
% Auto-generated: declare the official paper-run seed policy for reviewers
\newcommand{\SeedPolicy}{%
Paper seeds are defined as follows: the official paper evaluation (Table~\ref{tab:main_results})
uses fixed seed $0$ for deterministic execution.
Deterministic repeatability is assessed under evaluation-only seeds $\{0,1,2,3,4\}$ (Table~\ref{tab:multiseed});
all runs use the same fixed prediction artifact, so identical metrics with std $=0.0000$ are expected.
}
